OUR STORY
ABOUT
MOSCURE

Beyondmosquitocontrol—acommitmenttopublichealth,chemical-freeliving,andeveryfamily'srighttoprotection.

Read our story
— 01 —
BEYOND BUSINESS:
A PUBLIC HEALTH
RESPONSIBILITY

Therewasalwayssomethingunsettlingaboutthewaywelivedwithmosquitoes.

Notthebites.Nottheirritation.Buttheacceptance.

Forsomethingsosmall,mosquitoeshavequietlyremainedoneofthemostdangerousthreatstohumanlife—spreadingdiseaseslikedengue,malaria,andchikungunya,affectingmillionseveryyear.

Somewherealongtheway,acompromisebecamenormal:toprotectourselvesfrommosquitoes,wehadtoexposeourselvestosomethingelse.

Thatneverfeltright.

— 02 —

THE SHIFTFROM ACCEPTANCE TO ACTION

"

Why does protection have to come with side effects?

"

Whatstartedascuriosityquicklybecamesomethingdeeper.

Thiswasn'tjustaproductproblem.Itwasagapinhowweapproachedeverydayhealthandsafety.

Werealizedthatmosquitoprotectionhadalwaysbeentreatedasatemporaryfix—notasaproblemworthsolvingcompletely.

Andthatrealizationchangedeverything.

— 03 —

RETHINKING THE PROBLEM,NOT THE PRODUCT

Wedidn'tsetouttoimprovewhatalreadyexisted.Westeppedback.

Insteadofasking"Howdowerepelmosquitoesbetter?"weasked:

"How do we eliminate them — safely, effectively, and continuously?"

Thatquestionledtoyearsofresearch,experimentation,andrefinement.

Westudiedmosquitobehavior.Wetestedtechnologies.Webuilt,failed,rebuilt,andimproved.

Nottocreateanotheroption—buttocreateadifferentapproachentirely.

— 04 —

WHEN INNOVATIONBECAME RESPONSIBILITY

Mosquitoes are not a seasonal inconvenience.

They are a public health challenge.

Andsolvingthatcomeswithresponsibility.

AtMoscure,webegantoseeourroledifferently—notjustasinnovators,butascontributorstoalargercause.

Acausewhereprotectionshouldnotdependonawareness,

income,

oraccess.

— 05 —

A COMMITMENTBEYOND BUSINESS

Today,ourworkextendsbeyondproducts.Wearecommittedto:

Creating Awareness

Raising awareness around mosquito-borne diseases in communities that need it most — before the outbreak, not after.

Chemical-Free Living

Encouraging safer, chemical-free living environments across India — one home at a time.

Expanding Access

Expanding access to effective protection in underserved communities where mosquito-borne disease hits hardest.

Healthcare Partnerships

Supporting efforts that improve preventive health and hygiene through institutional partnerships and grassroots programs.

Becausetherealimpactofprotectionisnotmeasuredinunitssold—butinrisksreduced,andlivesmadesafer.

— 06 —

THE FUTUREWE ARE BUILDING

We envision a world where:

NO CHILD SLEEPS UNDER THE THREAT OF MOSQUITO-BORNE DISEASES
NO FAMILY DEPENDS ON HARMFUL CHEMICALS FOR PROTECTION
NO ENVIRONMENT BECOMES UNSAFE AFTER SUNSET

🤝 OUR CSR COMMITMENT

THROUGH OUR CSRINITIATIVES

Spreading awareness about mosquito-borne diseases in vulnerable communities
Promoting chemical-free living environments
Supporting access to safe protection in underserved areas
Partnering with institutions to improve preventive healthcare
PROTECT

📞 REACH US OUT

Because no life should be lost due to lack of protection.

Mosquito Problems
IN YOUR AREA?

We Can Help!

If you're facing mosquito issues in your area, we're here to provide effective, chemical-free solutions.

* We'll never share your details.

India's most effective MLID and Phototaxis technology mosquito trap. Chemical-free, family-safe protection against Dengue, Malaria, and Chikungunya.
